title: Quran, Sura 41: Fussilat
description: Sura 41 (Fussilat: Explained in Detail) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 41 (Fussilat: Explained in Detail) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: A revelation from the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful — a Book whose verses have been detailed, an Arabic Quran for a people who know.
